message:
ci: Fix chromium-headless-shell name

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/o3ae9nkokzxuzhdg927433dq

files.patch:
@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ jobs:
         run: bun test
 
       - name: Install Playwright browsers
-        run: bunx playwright install --with-deps chromium chromium_headless_shell
+        run: bunx playwright install --with-deps chromium chromium-headless-shell
 
       - name: Run E2E tests
         run: bun run test:e2e
